items.definition_en: A boss is the person in charge of the workers in an office.
items.example_en: My boss asked me to finish the report by Friday.

items.definition_en: A manager is someone who organizes and directs other people at work.
items.example_en: The manager is holding a meeting this afternoon.

items.definition_en: A colleague is a person you work with in an office.
items.example_en: She had lunch with her colleague yesterday.

items.definition_en: An employee is a person who works for a company or office.
items.example_en: The new employee started on Monday.

items.definition_en: A receptionist is a person who greets visitors and answers calls in an office.
items.example_en: The receptionist welcomed us with a smile.

items.definition_en: A secretary is a person who helps with office work and organizes schedules.
items.example_en: The secretary answered the phone quickly.

items.definition_en: A supervisor is someone who checks the work of others in an office.
items.example_en: Her supervisor gave her useful feedback.

items.definition_en: An intern is a student or recent graduate working in an office to gain experience.
items.example_en: Our team has a new intern for the summer.

items.definition_en: An assistant is someone who helps another person in their job at work.
items.example_en: The assistant prepared the documents for the meeting.

items.definition_en: A director is a person who is in charge of part of the company.
items.example_en: The director approved the new project plan.

items.definition_en: An accountant keeps records of money and accounts in an office.
items.example_en: The accountant checked all the invoices.

items.definition_en: A team leader is the person who leads a group at work.
items.example_en: Our team leader often helps us solve problems.

items.definition_en: A co-worker is someone you work with in the same office.
items.example_en: Her co-worker helped her with the project.

items.definition_en: Staff are the people who work for a business or office.
items.example_en: The office staff are very friendly and helpful.

items.definition_en: An executive is a person with a high position in a business or office.
items.example_en: The executives had a meeting about the company's future.

items.definition_en: A janitor cleans and maintains the building at work.
items.example_en: The janitor locks the office every night.

items.definition_en: An office worker is a person who works in an office.
items.example_en: Many office workers sit at a desk all day.

items.definition_en: A clerk does simple office tasks like filing or answering phones.
items.example_en: The clerk entered the data into the computer.

items.definition_en: A consultant is a person who gives expert advice in the office.
items.example_en: The company hired a consultant to help with the new project.

items.definition_en: Human resources is the department that manages staff in a company.
items.example_en: Human resources organized a training session for the employees.
